Interface LargeFileMultipartSource

All Known Implementing Classes:
LargeFileMultipartFileSource
public interface LargeFileMultipartSource
Represents a source of object data that can be streamed in parallel parts of arbitrary ranges within the object.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    InputStream
    getCompleteDataStream()
    Returns a stream that will provide all the object's data
    InputStream
    getPartDataStream(long offset, long length)
    Returns an _independent_ stream that provides only the specified range within the object data.
    long
    getTotalSize()
    Returns the total size of the object data

  • Method Details

    • getTotalSize

      long getTotalSize()
      Returns the total size of the object data

    • getCompleteDataStream

      InputStream getCompleteDataStream() throws IOException
      Returns a stream that will provide all the object's data
      Throws:
      IOException

    • getPartDataStream

      InputStream getPartDataStream(long offset, long length) throws IOException
      Returns an _independent_ stream that provides only the specified range within the object data. Note: this stream must be readable in parallel with streams of other parts/ranges.
      Throws:
      IOException
